case_title: PURLANTOV LILY ANN (STOYANOV) VS TOLPEN FARLEY S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PURLANTOV LILY ANN (STOYANOV) AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PURLANTOV LILY ANN (STOYANOV) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S. $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $379.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $404.30 AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TOLPEN FARLEY S.
